prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: refined dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 8, title Lord of Storms
Scene/background: towering ruined citadel under a violent violet thunderstorm, less cyan, more consistent with the main Vavarda palette
Subject: central storm lord battle-mage, hooded, ornate obsidian armor, commanding a bright branching violet lightning spear or bolt, more elite and readable than level 7
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy game splash art, high-detail, polished, readable at small size, consistent with levels 7, 9 and 25
Composition/framing: centered figure, square crop, one dominant lightning gesture, clean silhouette, dramatic sky
Lighting/mood: commanding, electric, elevated authority, imperial storm power
Color palette: black, silver, deep amethyst, electric violet, minimal blue undertones
Materials/textures: polished armor, storm haze, rain, lightning energy, gothic stone
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, one character only, avoid a cyan-heavy palette and keep the world visually consistent with the rest of the set
